arts.ttl: Preview: Preston North End vs. Middlesbrough - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Preston North End and Middlesbrough, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Ryan Giles closes in on Middlesbrough return after undergoing medical on Teesside
arts.sum: Boro and Hull City remain in talks but a deal being reached is believed to be extermely close, meaning the Tigers gave the left-back permission to travel to Teesside on Thursday. Ryan Giles is closing in on a return to Middlesbrough after being given permission by Hull City to travel to Teesside on Thursday and complete his medical.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough injury updates with one Boro star 'desperate' to get back and Jonny Howson latest
arts.sum: However, with Tommy Conway now in the latter stages of his rehabilitation programme after suffering a hamstring injury on Boxing Day, Michael Carrick admits the striker is desperate to get back in and around the group. On the squad in general for the weekend, after Luke Ayling and Aidan Morris made their first starts since injury on Tuesday against West Brom, the Boro head coach continued: “We won’t have anyone coming back into the group for Saturday.
